clauses.obligation: Franchise grants right to use McDonald's System at specific restaurant location only. No territorial rights. Term as specified (generally 20 years).
McDonald's will advise/consult periodically. Communications via visits, reports, seminars, newsletters.
McDonald's provides business manuals. Franchisee must adopt exclusively. Manuals are confidential trade secrets. Cannot disclose to non-employees.
Must use only McDonald's-approved advertising. Minimum 4% of Gross Sales annually. OPNAD and cooperative credits apply.
Must enroll at Hamburger University or designated center. McDonald's bears training facility costs. Franchisee pays travel/living/compensation.
Gross Sales = all revenues from restaurant operations, net of sales tax and refunds. Credit sales included when charged.
Monthly royalty on 10th of following month, percentage of Gross Sales as specified.
Must participate in automatic debit/credit transfer program.
15% annual rate (or max legal rate) on past due amounts, monthly compounding.
$45,000. Earned by McDonald's. Refundable only if construction not completed within 1 year.

Monthly sales statement by 11am CST on 1st business day of month. Monthly operating/statistical report by 25th. Annual P&L and balance sheet within 90 days (may require CPA certification). Records kept 3 years. McDonald's has right to inspect/audit.
No involvement in any competing or similar restaurant business without prior written consent.
18 months after termination or sale, no involvement in similar restaurant within 10-mile radius.
Cannot duplicate System. Cannot disclose System to non-employees. Cannot use marks outside restaurant. <2% public stock exception.
Must comply with entire McDonald's System: designated menu, food specifications, preparation methods, quality, appearance, facilities, service. McDonald's may inspect at all reasonable times.

Clean/wholesome operation. Purchase per specs. Keep constructed per blueprints. No alterations without consent. Make repairs. Parking for customers only. Open 7 days, 7am-11pm minimum. Uniforms. McDonald's-only paper/packaging/ingredients/methods. Prompt supplier payment. Comply with all laws.
Full time and best efforts. Personal devotion. No conflicting enterprises.
Death/disability: may assign to qualified spouse/heirs. McDonald's may manage up to 12 months. If no disposition in 12 months, McDonald's option to purchase at FMV.
May assign to wholly-owned corporation with McDonald's consent and Stockholders Agreement.
20 days notice to McDonald's before sale. McDonald's has 10-day option to match.

Requires McDonald's consent (not arbitrary). Evaluation criteria: experience, financial, character, full-time ability, locality, equity, conflicts. Transferee assumes full liability. Original remains liable for full term. Royalty adjusts to current rate.
Not agent of McDonald's. Independent contractor. Not partners or joint employers.

Workers comp + $100K/$500K/$100K employer liability. Commercial general liability $5M per occurrence/$5M aggregate. McDonald's named as additional insured. 30-day cancellation notice. Best A+/A rating, FSC ≥IX.
17 enumerated non-curable defaults. McDonald's may terminate at its election.
Non-material breaches: not grounds for termination except repeated breaches. McDonald's may seek injunction/damages. Any uncured breach sufficient to withhold transfer approval.
Immediate right to enter/take possession. 30-day option to purchase at FMV (no intangible asset payment). Must return manuals, cease System/marks use.
McDonald's entitled to attorneys' fees, court costs, litigation expenses if it prevails.
Franchisee indemnifies and holds McDonald's harmless against all claims/judgments/penalties/expenses arising from restaurant operations. McDonald's may elect to have franchisee also defend.
Illinois law governs.
10 acknowledgments: no renewal promise, no profitability representation, no territorial rights, entire agreement, McDonald's owns marks, no future franchise promise, no oral representations.

State-specific riders for HI, MD, MN, ND, WA + multi-state anti-waiver rider (CA, IL, IN, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI). Key modifications: HI/MD delete acknowledgments. MD: MD law for MD franchise claims. MN: 90-day termination notice, 180-day non-renewal notice, transfer consent not unreasonably withheld. ND: noncompetes unenforceable. WA: WA Act prevails.

key_burdens.burden: Rent: Base + Pass Thru + Percentage Rent per FA terms
Taxes: Tenant pays all real estate taxes, assessments, governmental charges
Maintenance: Tenant responsible for all maintenance and repair of premises
No assignment without Landlord consent per FA terms
Insurance: Liability + rental + property per FA terms
Default/Re-entry: Extensive default triggers matching FA. Landlord may re-enter, expel, repossess. Liquidated damages = present value of remaining rent.
Holding over: Double rent as liquidated damages
